generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/dtdf/vocab#"
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor for measuring motor shaft angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]
instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind gearbox for measuring output shaft angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]
instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]
instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]
instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]
instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]
instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]
instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]
instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to refine robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]
instance PhysicalRelationshipInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization providing contextual understanding of physical relationships"
]
instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of robot control algorithms based on friction model insights",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]
instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard for enhanced understanding of physical relationships",
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalRelationshipInsight
]
instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model refinement",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]
instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control",
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]
instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for physical relationship understanding",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]
instance MotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance GearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from gearbox encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance InputCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current measurement data (I_M)",
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance AngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance Acceleration : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration from angular velocity",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DerivedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque from current and position measurements",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component and connector diagrams for structural modeling of the robot axis",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]
instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model implementing Dahl friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink model implementing LuGre friction model",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance DataCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for deriving torque, angular velocity, and acceleration from sensor measurements",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]
instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s",
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of sensor data via MQTT protocol, with processing and visualization occurring synchronously with physical system operations to enable immediate feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, Processing components for friction model computation, and unified dashboard visualization for friction analysis and motion accuracy enhancement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, capturing real-time operational data to account for wear, tool changes, and application-specific variations during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured data; no specific verification metrics or uncertainty quantification methods detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming between physical robot and digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) are used for modeling and data administration, though specific standard bodies are not explicitly mentioned in the document."
]
